name: io.github.sergii-ziborov/weavatrix
description: Local graph for fast app understanding, Health, dead code, clones, history and architecture safety.

packageArguments.description: Absolute path to the initial Git repository (the offline open_repo tool can explicitly switch repositories)

Security profile (offline, pinned, osv, hosted, full) or exact comma-separated groups graph,search,source,health,build,retarget,crossrepo,advisories,hosted; legacy online aliases advisories plus hosted

environmentVariables.name: WEAVATRIX_PRECISION
environmentVariables.description: Optional semantic precision mode: lsp (default) uses the bundled bounded TypeScript/JavaScript language-server overlay; off keeps parser-only graphs

environmentVariables.name: WEAVATRIX_SYNC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional endpoint used only by explicit hosted-profile calls; preview_sync is local-only and sync_graph requires dry_run:false plus its exact short-lived confirmation before sending

environmentVariables.name: WEAVATRIX_SYNC_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional bearer token for confirmed sync_graph requests to the configured hosted endpoint; required by pull_architecture_contract

environmentVariables.name: WEAVATRIX_ALLOW_TEST_RUNS
environmentVariables.description: Optional explicit permission for verified_change to run requested test/check/verify package.json scripts; must be exactly 1
